package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for ci_missing_go_test_race: Repository automation that does not visibly run `go test -race` for Go code.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario374Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
